_comment: Per-hook enable/disable config for psters-ai-workflow (Claude Code). Set 'enabled' to false to skip a hook entirely. Reload plugins (`/reload-plugins`) after editing.

track-edit.description: Tracks code vs doc edits per session to power the doc-guard Stop hook.

migration-atomic-reminder.description: Reminds to run drift-check + run locally right after typeorm:generate.

commit-convention-reminder.description: Reminds the [TICKET-XXXX] commit prefix on `git commit`.

doc-guard-stop.description: On Stop, warns when code was edited but no docs were touched in the session.
